title: Bridge Essay: The unity and diversity of verbal and visuospatial creativity: Dynamic changes i

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Knowledge/Gnosis** (Phase 14) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Knowledge/Gnosis to mechanistic neuroscience through The, unity, and, diversity, of.

**The unity and diversity of verbal and visuospatial creativity: Dynamic changes in hemispheric lateralisation.** — Hum Brain Mapp. PMID: 37772359. DOI: 10.1002/hbm.26494. The investigation of similarities and differences in the mechanisms of verbal and visuospatial creative thinking has long been acontroversial topic. Prior studies found that visuospatial creativity was primarily supported by the right hemisphere, whereas verbal creativity relied on the interaction between both hemispheres.
